examples: The name Vulcan was given to the undiscovered planet.
In Juan's world, the unknown and undiscovered was vast and marvelous.
In any case, failure to find fossils of a predicted kind does not rule out their existence in an undiscovered deposit.
The manuscripts were copied in the 1630s, and remained undiscovered at the castle until the 1960s.
The bad news is that while these funds may be obscure, they are not undiscovered.
